name: OpenRouter Credits
description: Track your LLM spending in real-time. Monitor balance, daily and weekly costs, and per-model breakdown. Automatically snapshots credits at midnight for consumption tracking.

schedules.name: daily-credits-snapshot
schedules.description: Saves a snapshot of remaining credits at midnight for daily/weekly consumption tracking.

examples: How much did I spend on OpenRouter today?
Which model costs me the most?
How many credits did I use this week?

commands.name: credits
commands.shortDescription: Check OpenRouter balance and LLM spending
commands.description: Use the credits_status tool to fetch the current OpenRouter balance, today's spending, and this week's total consumption. Show a clear summary with remaining credits prominently displayed. Include a per-model breakdown if available. Flag if daily spending is unusually high.
